things.name: Mount Rinjani National Park
things.description: Indonesia's second highest volcano (3,726m) with a crater lake - epic 3-day summit trek

things.name: Senggigi Beach
things.description: Lombok's main resort beach with views of Bali's Agung volcano across the Lombok Strait

things.name: Gili Islands (Trawangan, Meno, Air)
things.description: Three car-free coral islands with the best snorkelling and diving in Indonesia

things.name: Pura Meru Temple
things.description: Lombok's largest Hindu temple built in 1720 with three multi-tiered shrines

things.name: Sasak Village Sade
things.description: Traditional Sasak village where women weave ikat cloth in 600-year-old bamboo huts

things.name: Mayura Water Palace
things.description: 1744 Hindu royal water palace with floating pavilion

things.name: Kuta Lombok Beach
things.description: Pristine bay with pink sand and turquoise water - the island's most beautiful beach

things.name: Sukarara Weaving Village
things.description: Traditional Sasak women weaving songket (silver-thread) cloth using back-strap looms

things.name: Segara Anak Crater Lake
things.description: Blue lake inside Rinjani's caldera at 2,000m with hot springs

things.name: Ayam Taliwang
things.description: Lombok's signature dish - half a chicken grilled with ferociously hot shrimp paste sauce
